_meta.description: Navigate to Okta Reports section and perceive available reports. Covers system log, user report, app usage.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14

auth.note: Okta admin console auth — session must be active at trial-8689388-admin.okta.com

anomalies: Okta OIE: /admin/reports returns 404. Correct path for system log is /report/system_log_2 (see ANOMALIES A-011, A-017)
Reports sub-paths: system log at /report/system_log_2, user report at /report/usersummary

chain.note: Correct system log path — NOT /admin/reports (that returns 404 on OIE trial, see A-011)
Perceive system log page. Expected: event list with columns for Event, Result, Target, Actor, Date.
